docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BROADCAST MUSIC, INC. SERVED OCT-14-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE & TALMADGE INC/DBA WORLD GYM SHOWPLACE

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-15-1998, OFF CALENDAR SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 3-12-98 ARE VACATED. DISMISSAL FILED ON 11-3-97.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-30-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY ELIZABETH A BLEIER. HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-11-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-11-1998, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFT.
